result.stdout:
Seq MCP Server - Query Seq logs via Model Context Protocol

Usage: seq-mcp-server [options]

Options:
  --version, -v    Show version information
  --help, -h       Show this help message

Environment Variables:
  SEQ_SERVER_URL   URL of your Seq server (required)
  SEQ_API_KEY      API key for accessing Seq (required)

This is an MCP server designed to be launched by MCP clients.
Configure it in your MCP client (e.g., Claude Desktop) settings.
